periods.name: This Afternoon
periods.detailedForecast: Scattered showers and thunderstorms before 3pm, then isolated showers and thunderstorms between 3pm and 5pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 62. North wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.
